tickets.subject: Unexpected charge on card
tickets.description: Customer reports an issue with payment for order ORD-10791. Charge appears incorrect.
tickets.resolution: Duplicate charge refunded. Payment records corrected.

tickets.subject: Received wrong item
tickets.description: Customer received an incorrect item in order ORD-10805. The product does not match what was ordered.
tickets.resolution: Return label sent. Correct item shipped once return received.

tickets.subject: Charged twice for order
tickets.description: Customer reports an issue with payment for order ORD-10804. Charge appears incorrect.
tickets.resolution: Duplicate charge refunded. Payment records corrected.
